title: Aurora, 33842, Palm Pals Alice Sapphire 5In, Soft Toy, Blue
features: Introducing Palm Pals Alice Sapphire Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. This soft toy is a blue-coloured cute and cuddly smiling sapphire-shaped soft toy which is filled with beans that perfectly fit into your palm. Great for a little cuddling!

This adorable Alice Sapphire soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Whimsical collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Palm Pals is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Alice Sapphire measures 13cm. This blue-coloured soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is a birthday or a general gift. Everyone will fall in love with this adorable soft toy which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
